The '''''Vengeance II''''', or simply '''''Vengeance''''', was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]] and under command of [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]].

==History==
Following the loss of the [[Vengeance (Imperial-class, Jerec)|original ''Vengeance'']], the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] had the ship's computer core salvaged and transferred to a new ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer, the ''Vengeance II''. With its predecessor destroyed, this ship was often simply referred to as the ''Vengeance''.<ref name="TCSWE" />

The ship was later modified, with its cargo holds refitted to carry additional [[TIE starfighter]]s. After that, Jerec transferred the ''Vengeance II'' to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] infamous Death Squadron, as he was already constructing a new [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] flagship, also named the [[Vengeance (Vengeance-class)|''Vengeance'']].<ref name="CCG" /> Shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] the ship was commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mordon (Human)|Mordon]] and participated in the subjugation of the [[Taroon system/Legends|Taroon system]].<ref name="The Stele Chronicles">{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}}</ref>

At some point in time, Jerec was able to reacquire the ''Vengeance II''. About one year after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Cronal|Blackhole]] contacted Jerec and recruited him into the forces of the reincarnated [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. To show his loyalty, Jerec gave Blackhole the ''Vengeance II'' to take back to [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].<ref name="DFS6" />

==Behind the scenes==
In his Star Wars Blog [[Abel G. Peña]] made clear, that the reference in The Dark Forces Saga, Part 6 was meant to clarify, that the Star Destroyer named ''Vengeance'' that appeared in the game [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] was the same ship as the ''Vengeance II''.
